## Commands

```bash

# Run a single file
```

- **Location**: `tests/`
- **Naming**: `*.test.js`
- **Harness**: `tests/helpers/plannerTestLoader.js` loads deterministic planner-only slices from `assets/js/app.js` and parses `assets/js/passes-data.js`.
